title: Assistant Relationship Manager | Leading Private Banks & PWM Institutions
description:
Lleapz specializes in executive search for the financial services industry. Through collaborative relationships built on trust, respect and long-term success, we serve as a bridge between leading financial institutions and talented professionals in Asia. With strategic advisory, deep market insight, and genuine dedication, we support organizational success and sustainable career fulfilment.

On behalf of our clients, we're recruiting Assistant Relationship Managers / Client Services Officer to support high-performing teams at leading Private Wealth Management institutions in Singapore. In this dynamic role, you'll work directly with Relationship Managers to service HNW and UHNW clients, gaining invaluable exposure to best-in-class private banking practices and building a rewarding career.

Key Responsibilities

  • Deliver comprehensive support to Relationship Managers while building long-term, trust-based client relationships.
  • Execute a broad range of banking and investment transactions with accuracy and efficiency.
  • Provide high-quality client and account administration services, ensuring timely and error-free delivery.
  • Handle and resolve day-to-day client and RM queries on transactional activity, operations, and account processes.
  • Support RMs in client onboarding, including client profiling, KYC due diligence, and documentation input into relevant systems.
  • Ensure all client documentation, records, and reporting comply with internal policies, credit standards, and regulatory requirements.
  • Maintain high standards of conduct, risk awareness, and adherence to internal control, compliance, and risk governance frameworks.

Your Profile

  • Minimum 4 years of client service experience in private wealth management or banking, covering Taiwanese or NRI clients.
  • Holding valid MAS-recognised certifications, including CACS Papers 1 and 2 and the relevant CMFAS modules, or the ability to obtain them promptly.
  • Strong general banking knowledge with solid understanding of private banking products and investment solutions.
  • Strong communication abilities (verbal & written) in English, and Mandarin if covering Taiwanese clients.
  • Detail-oriented, organized, and proactive with excellent execution and follow-through.
  • Thrive in a fast-paced environment while managing multiple priorities with composure and precision.
  • Ability to collaborate effectively with colleagues across teams.
  • Degree in Finance, Business, Economics, or related discipline.
  • Genuine commitment to compliance, ethical standards, and continuous professional development.

Why Connect with Lleapz?

  • Access multiple exclusive, unlisted opportunities across leading institutions.
  • Receive tailored career guidance and support from experienced industry specialists.
  • Join a respected professional network for immediate or future career opportunities.

Ready to make your next move?

Apply now or reach out directly for a confidential conversation.

postedCompany.description:
Lleapz is a specialist executive search firm focused on the Financial Services industry. We connect talented professionals with opportunities at leading institutions across Hong Kong, Singapore, and the wider Asian region.

Our consultants draw on both in-house experience at leading financial institutions and recruitment expertise from specialist search firms. This dual perspective gives us strong networks, deep industry knowledge, and a clear understanding of what both clients and candidates need. We take a consultative approach to recruitment—working closely with everyone involved to make sure each placement is the right fit and adds real value.

Coverage & Specialization

• Private Banking

• Wealth Management

• Family Office

• CEO and Board

• Investment Management

• Investment Advisory

• Strategy & Transformation

What Sets Lleapz Apart

• Financial Services Expertise: Deep specialization provides insight into private banking, wealth management, investment management, and strategic leadership hiring.

•Asia Regional Focus: We combine regional expertise with access to major Asian financial hubs, supporting clients across Singapore, Hong Kong, and the wider region.

• Consultative & Personal Approach: Every search is managed by an experienced consultant, ensuring tailored solutions, close attention, and high-touch service.

• Long-Term Partnerships: We build enduring relationships, guiding clients and professionals toward their highest potential with consistent support and market knowledge.

• Integrity & Confidentiality: We uphold the highest ethical standards, maintaining complete confidentiality and earning the lasting trust of clients and candidates.

• Commitment to Excellence: We deliver precise, insight-driven placements that create lasting value for both candidates and organizations, ensuring every engagement advances careers and business objectives.

Leaping towards the zenith—supporting clients and candidates to achieve their greatest successes in Asia’s dynamic financial landscape.
postedCompany.name: LLEAPZ SINGAPORE PTE. LTD.
